# 3D3D Atlantic Cooperative
> Distributed 3D printing cooperative based in Fredericton, NB connecting customers with local makers across Atlantic Canada.

3D3D is a cooperative that routes custom 3D printing jobs and ships ready-made printed products through a network of makers. Makers keep 75% of revenue. Turnaround is typically 24–48 hours for standard jobs.

## Services
- [Custom 3D Printing Quote](https://3d3d.ca/quote): Upload STL, 3MF, STEP, OBJ, PDF, or describe your idea
- [Print Shop](https://3d3d.ca/shop): Ready-made products for home decor, tools, automotive, marine, gifts, and seasonal use
- [Join as a Maker](https://3d3d.ca/makers): Apply to the cooperative network

## About
- [About 3D3D](https://3d3d.ca/about): Cooperative model, how it works, and the Old Girl community printer

## Blog
- [Blog Index](https://3d3d.ca/blog)
- [Why Cooperative 3D Printing](https://3d3d.ca/blog/why-cooperative-3d-printing)

- [Atlantic Canada Maker Network](https://3d3d.ca/blog/atlantic-canada-maker-network)
